blended.narrative: Discovery is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 12 inches of snowfall of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 5,187 ft. Looking ahead, 15 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 6" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tomorrow: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Sunday: 3.1" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.

recent_conditions.narrative: 9.6" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 50".
